27854480.fa: Halie Anthony is vice president of IT at Peak Vista Community Health Centers in Colorado Springs, CO. Anthony is a healthcare leader who plays an active role in the HTM field. She is passionate about people and strives to serve her teams and peers by inspiring them to think bigger. When she isn't working, she enjoys fishing with her two children and adding to her husband's "honey-do" list
